- [Remote cluster configuration](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/resources/remoteclusterconfiguration): API for this Calico Enterprise resource.
- [Security event webhook](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/resources/securityeventwebhook): API for this Calico Enterprise resource.
- [Staged global network policy](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/resources/stagedglobalnetworkpolicy): API for this resource.
- [Staged Kubernetes network policy](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/resources/stagedkubernetesnetworkpolicy): API for this Calico Enterprise resource.
- [Staged network policy](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/resources/stagednetworkpolicy): API for this Calico Enterprise resource.
- [Tier](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/resources/tier): API for this Calico Enterprise resource.
- [Workload endpoint](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/resources/workloadendpoint): API for this Calico Enterprise resource.
- [Architecture](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/architecture/): Calico Enterprise component architecture diagram, network design, and the data path between workloads.
- [Component architecture](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/architecture/overview): Understand the Calico Enterprise components and the basics of BGP networking.
- ['The Calico Enterprise data path: IP routing and iptables'](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/architecture/data-path): Learn how packets flow between workloads in a datacenter, or between a workload and the internet.
- [Network design](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/architecture/design/): Deep dive into using Calico over Ethernet and IP fabrics.
- [Calico over Ethernet fabrics](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/architecture/design/l2-interconnect-fabric): Understand the interconnect fabric options in a Calico network.
- [Calico over IP fabrics](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/architecture/design/l3-interconnect-fabric): Understand considerations for implementing interconnect fabrics with Calico.
- [Component resources](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/component-resources/): Reference content for Calico Enterprise component resources.
- [Configuring the Calico Enterprise CNI plugins](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/component-resources/configuration): Details for configuring the Calico Enterprise CNI plugins.
- [Configure resource requests and limits](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/component-resources/configure-resources): Configure Resource requests and limits.
- [kube-controllers](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/component-resources/kube-controllers/): kube-controllers is a set of Kubernetes controllers for Calico
- [Configuring the Calico Enterprise Kubernetes controllers](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/component-resources/kube-controllers/configuration): Calico Enterprise Kubernetes controllers monitor the Kubernetes API and perform actions based on cluster state.
- [Monitoring kube-controllers with Prometheus](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/component-resources/kube-controllers/prometheus): Review metrics for the kube-controllers component if you are using Prometheus.
- [Calico Enterprise node (node)](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/component-resources/node/): Learn about the components that comprise the node.
- [Configuring node](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/component-resources/node/configuration): Customize node using environment variables.
- [Felix](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/component-resources/node/felix/): Felix is a Calico component that runs on every machine that provides endpoints.
- [Configuring Felix](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/component-resources/node/felix/configuration): Configure Felix, the daemon that runs on every machine that provides endpoints.
- [Monitoring Felix with Prometheus](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/component-resources/node/felix/prometheus): Review metrics for the Felix component if you are using Prometheus.
- [Typha](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/component-resources/typha/): Typha is the Calico component for scaling Kubernetes deployments.
- [Reduce node impacts on datastore](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/component-resources/typha/overview): Increase scale and reduce node impact on the datastore using Typha.
- [Configuring Typha](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/component-resources/typha/configuration): Configure Typha for scaling Kubernetes API datastore (kdd).
- [Monitoring Typha with Prometheus](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/component-resources/typha/prometheus): Review metrics for the Typha component if you are using Prometheus.
- [Configuration on public clouds](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/public-cloud/): Tips for configuring Calico Enterprise in your public cloud provider.
- [Amazon Web Services](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/public-cloud/aws): Advantages of using Calico Enterprise in AWS.
- [Azure](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/public-cloud/azure): Support for Calico Enterprise in Azure.
- [Google Compute Engine](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/public-cloud/gce): Methods to ensure that traffic between containers on different hosts is not dropped by GCE fabric.
- [Host endpoints](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/host-endpoints/): Protect host endpoints with Calico network policy.
- [Host endpoints](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/host-endpoints/overview): Secure host network interfaces.
- [Creating policy for basic connectivity](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/host-endpoints/connectivity): Customize the Calico failsafe policy to protect host endpoints.
- [Creating host endpoint objects](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/host-endpoints/objects): To protect a host interface, start by creating a host endpoint object in etcd.
- [Selector-based policies](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/host-endpoints/selector): Apply ordered policies to endpoints that match specific label selectors.
- [Failsafe rules](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/host-endpoints/failsafe): Avoid cutting off connectivity to hosts because of incorrect network policies.
- [Pre-DNAT policy](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/host-endpoints/pre-dnat): Apply rules in a host endpoint policy before any DNAT.
- [Apply on forwarded traffic](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/host-endpoints/forwarded): Learn the subtleties using the applyOnForward option in host endpoint policies.
- [Summary of host endpoint policies](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/host-endpoints/summary): How different host endpoint rules affect packet flows.
- [Connection tracking](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/host-endpoints/conntrack): Workaround for Linux conntrack if Calico policy is not working as it should.
- [Attribution](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/attribution): Third-party license attribution report for Calico Enterprise
- [REST API Reference](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/rest-api-reference): REST API reference
- [Component versions](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/component-versions): A list of component versions for Calico Enterprise
- [Frequently asked questions](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/faq): Common questions that users ask about Calico Enterprise.
- [Platform support policy](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/reference/support-policy): Calico Enterprise platform support policy.

## Optional

- [Calico Enterprise 3.22 release notes](https://docs.tigera.io/calico-enterprise/latest/release-notes/): What's new, and why features provide value for upgrading.
